session_context.project: VetAssist — Brainstorm Artifact Integration with Tactical Theme
session_context.target: Integrate the May 2026 brainstorm artifact schema into VetAssist. Theme: vetassist_tactical (dark forest green, military precision). Build the intake wizard as an interactive React component. No stubs. Full production implementation.

theme.name: vetassist_tactical
theme.aesthetic: military precision, dark forest green, veteran services, no gratuitous decoration

coding_standards.observer_pattern: All state changes emit events. No polling. React state plus event emission.
coding_standards.no_hardcoding: All brainstorm content loaded from a data file. Theme tokens in a constants file.
coding_standards.gamification: XP system optional toggle. Defaults on. Stored in localStorage.
coding_standards.accessibility: All interactive elements keyboard navigable. ARIA labels on all controls.
coding_standards.privacy: Voice input uses Web Speech API only — no external service. Graceful degradation if unsupported.

deliverables.purpose: Theme token constants. No logic — pure data.
requirements: Export VETASSIST_TACTICAL_THEME as ThemeConfig typed object
All tokens from theme section above
Sound cue frequencies as constants: SELECT_HZ=880, LOCK_HZ=[523,659], ACHIEVE_HZ=[523,659,784], RANK_HZ=[523,659,784,1047]

deliverables.purpose: XP calculation, rank progression, achievement tracking. Pure logic, no React.
deliverables.rank_thresholds: 200 XP per rank, names from theme.rank_progression array

deliverables.purpose: Web Speech API voice capture. Appends transcript to free-text field.
requirements: Uses window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition
Returns null (renders nothing) if API not supported — no error shown
Microphone icon idle, pulsing CSS animation while listening
On transcript: calls onTranscript(text) prop callback
Never sends audio to external service — browser-native only

deliverables.purpose: Renders any of the 6 question types. Delegates to sub-components.
requirements: Props: question, value, onChange, theme
Each type is a separate internal component or import
All 4 affordances rendered below every question: FreeTextOverride, VoiceInput, HybridComposer, FeedbackFlag
Affordances always visible — not hidden, not in a menu

deliverables.purpose: Brainstorm content for VetAssist veteran intake wizard.
requirements: Minimum 4 sections: veteran background, service needs, tech comfort, goals
Each section minimum 3 questions
Use at least 4 different question types across the artifact
All options include rationale explaining the trade-off
Pre-lock obvious decisions with locked: true

deliverables.purpose: Top-level wizard. Section nav left, active question right, XP bar top.
requirements: Props: data (intake data), theme (ThemeConfig), onComplete (answers callback)
useState for answers Record<string, unknown>
XPEngine integrated — award XP on every answer change
Section completion detection — mark section done when all questions answered
Export button when all sections complete — calls onComplete(answers)
Achievement toast: upper right, 4 seconds, then auto-dismiss

build_order: 7. USAGE.md — one page for the VetAssist dev team
